business.name: Gordian One
business.tagline: Accounting, tax and advisory services for growing businesses.

services.title: Bookkeeping and monthly accounts
services.summary: Transaction processing, bank reconciliations, supplier and customer ledger control, and monthly financial packs.

services.title: Tax and SARS compliance
services.summary: VAT, provisional tax, income tax and compliance deadline support for South African businesses.

services.title: Payroll administration
services.summary: Payroll processing, payslips, EMP submissions, leave records and monthly payroll control.

services.title: Annual financial statements
services.summary: Year-end statements, supporting schedules and reporting packs for owners, lenders and compliance.

services.title: Management reporting
services.summary: Monthly dashboards, profit analysis, cash-flow snapshots and decision-ready commentary.

services.title: Business advisory
services.summary: Budgeting, forecasting, finance process improvement and practical growth guidance.
